title: Claude Code feature parity (permissions / orange theme / output styles / hooks / statusline / commands / memory)
overview: Bring Klaudex closer to Claude Code feature parity by layering a real permission model on top of the existing auto_approve flag, adding a 'Claude Orange' theme variant, surfacing output styles / hooks / statusline configs that Claude Code reads from ~/.claude/settings.json, and adding in-app browsers for slash commands and CLAUDE.md memory files. Reuses Klaudex's existing auto_approve plumbing, claude_config.rs parsers, theme infrastructure, and settings-panel sections; only builds what's net-new on top.
scopeChallenge: User selected HOLD mode. Klaudex already has AppSettings.auto_approve + task_set_auto_approve cmd + AutoApproveToggle.tsx; gap is the UX layer (allowlist/denylist patterns, header YOLO toggle, settings section, Cmd+Shift+Y). Theme system already supports dark/light/system + ThemeSelector.tsx; adding 'claude' is a 3-file change. claude_config.rs already parses agents/skills/commands/steering/memory/MCP; output styles + hooks + statusline follow the same pattern. ClaudeCommand and ClaudeMemoryFile already parsed; only UI components missing. Ruled out: Klaudex executing hooks itself (handled by claude subprocess), subagent UI (already shipped), plan mode (already wired).

existingCodeLeverage.existingCode: src-tauri/src/commands/claude_config.rs scan_agents / scan_skills / scan_commands / scan_steering_rules / scan_memory_files / parse_mcp_servers
ClaudeCommand struct + scan_commands fn already populate claudeConfigStore
ClaudeMemoryFile struct + scan_memory_files already populate claudeConfigStore

failureModes.risk: Pattern matcher mishandles glob edge cases (e.g., '**') resulting in over-permissive auto-approve
failureModes.mitigation: TASK-117 table-driven tests cover glob + edge cases. Default to Deny on malformed pattern.

failureModes.risk: User imports ~/.claude/settings.json with broad allow rules they didn't author themselves
failureModes.mitigation: Confirmation dialog shows per-rule preview before merge; merge is dedup not replace.

failureModes.risk: Statusline shell command runs untrusted code from ~/.claude/settings.json
failureModes.mitigation: Sandbox: 2s timeout, 1KB stdout cap, PATH-only env. Klaudex doesn't add new attack surface vs Claude Code itself.

failureModes.risk: Theme switch flickers / FOUC during page load
failureModes.mitigation: Apply .claude class to <html> in index.html AND in main.tsx before React renders, matching the existing dark-theme pattern documented in CLAUDE.md.

failureModes.risk: Bypass mode + deny rule conflict confuses user about which wins
failureModes.mitigation: Deny always wins (Claude Code semantics). Banner text reads 'Bypassing permissions (deny rules still enforced)' when there's a non-empty deny list.

failureModes.risk: Legacy auto_approve: true + new permissions block both present after upgrade
failureModes.mitigation: Migration: explicit permissions block wins. Once user touches permissions UI, auto_approve is dropped on next save.

failureModes.risk: Hooks UI suggests Klaudex executes hooks (it doesn't)
failureModes.mitigation: Explicit copy: 'Hooks are executed by the Claude CLI, not Klaudex.'

failureModes.risk: Statusline command depends on env vars not in PATH-only sandbox
failureModes.mitigation: Pipe context as JSON on stdin (cwd, model, task_id, message_count). Document the contract in code comment + statusline section copy.

testCoverageMap.codepath: Permissions struct serde round-trip + legacy migration
Permissions section UI: mode switch, add/remove rule
Statusline command exec sandbox (timeout, truncation, env)

tasks.title: Permissions Rust type + AppSettings extension (with per-project migration)
tasks.description: Add Permissions struct (mode: PermissionMode, allow: Vec<String>, deny: Vec<String>) to settings.rs. Add permissions field to AppSettings with #[serde(default)]. Add permissions: Option<Permissions> to ProjectPrefs (mirrors how auto_approve: Option<bool> is per-project today). Migration: legacy auto_approve: true → mode=Bypass; per-project Some(true) → Some({mode: Bypass}); None left as None so global wins.
acceptanceCriteria: Permissions struct + PermissionMode enum compile, both #[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
AppSettings.permissions defaults to { mode: Ask, allow: [], deny: [] } when missing
ProjectPrefs.permissions is Option<Permissions>; None means 'fall back to global'
Backward compat (global): existing settings file with auto_approve: true and no permissions block deserializes to mode: Bypass
Backward compat (per-project): projectPrefs[*].auto_approve: Some(true) migrates to projectPrefs[*].permissions = Some({ mode: Bypass }); Some(false) → Ask; None → None
Round-trip serialize → deserialize preserves all fields including per-project
bun run check:rust passes

tasks.title: Permission pattern matcher
tasks.description: Create src-tauri/src/commands/permissions.rs with a pattern matcher: given tool name, args, and lists of allow + deny patterns, return Allow | Deny | NoMatch. Pattern grammar: Tool(arg-glob:*). Deny rules win over allow rules. Pure function, table-driven tests.
acceptanceCriteria: match_permission(tool, args, allow, deny) returns Deny if any deny pattern matches even when an allow pattern also matches
Bash(npm test:*) matches both 'npm test' and 'npm test --watch'
Read(./src/**) does NOT match Read(./node_modules/foo.ts) (failure case)
Empty allow + empty deny + mode=ask returns NoMatch
Malformed pattern (e.g., 'Bash(') is logged and skipped, not panicked
Tests cover glob *, prefix match, exact match, deny-overrides-allow, malformed input

tasks.title: Claude Orange theme variant
tasks.description: Add 'claude' as a 4th theme option. Modify src/tailwind.css with a .claude CSS class block (color-scheme: dark + #D97757 accent tokens), src/renderer/components/settings/ThemeSelector.tsx with the new option, and src-tauri/src/commands/settings.rs doc comment.
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting 'Claude' applies .claude class to <html> and changes accent to orange immediately
dark/light/system themes continue to work unchanged
system theme matches OS dark preference but stays in orange variant when user explicitly picked 'claude'
Failure case: theme: 'invalid' falls back to dark without crashing
bun run check:ts and bun run check:rust pass

tasks.title: Output style + hook + statusline Rust types
tasks.description: Add ClaudeOutputStyle, ClaudeHook, StatuslineConfig structs to claude_config.rs. Extend ClaudeConfig with output_styles, hooks, statusline fields with #[serde(default)]. Just types; parsers come in TASK-108/109/110.
acceptanceCriteria: All three structs derive Serialize, Deserialize, Clone, Debug with #[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
ClaudeConfig gains the three fields with #[serde(default)]
Existing get_claude_config callers don't break — empty arrays / None for new fields
bun run check:rust passes

tasks.title: Wire permission matcher into ACP request_permission flow
tasks.description: Extend acp/client.rs around line 131 (where auto_approve is checked) to call match_permission from TASK-102. Apply rule: Deny always wins, Allow auto-approves, NoMatch + Bypass auto-approves, NoMatch + AllowListed/Ask falls through to user prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: Allow-listed Bash invocation auto-approves without prompt
Deny-listed Bash invocation auto-denies even when mode is Bypass (deny > bypass)
No-match in Ask mode prompts the user (existing behavior preserved)
Failure case: matcher panic falls back to user prompt (don't auto-anything dangerous)
No Send/!Send regression — matcher is sync + pure

tasks.title: Settings → Permissions UI section
tasks.description: Create src/renderer/components/settings/permissions-section.tsx. Mode radio (Ask/AllowListed/Bypass), allow + deny pattern lists with add/remove, persistence via settingsStore. Mount in SettingsPanel.tsx as a new section.
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a mode persists and survives app restart
Adding/removing patterns updates state and persists immediately
Failure case: empty allow + empty deny + Bypass mode renders correctly with the same banner as the header
bun run check:ts passes

tasks.title: YOLO mode header toggle + safety banner + Cmd+Shift+Y shortcut + retire AutoApproveToggle
tasks.description: Extend AppHeader.tsx with a permission-mode chip. Click cycles Ask → Listed → Bypass. Render red banner above chat panel when Bypass active. Add Cmd+Shift+Y to useKeyboardShortcuts.ts and /yolo slash command in useSlashAction.ts. Retire the legacy AutoApproveToggle.tsx: preferred path is to remove it + its mount points; fallback is to rebind it to read permissions.mode === 'bypass' (with per-project override). No widget should still write to legacy auto_approve boolean after this task.
acceptanceCriteria: Mode chip reflects settings.permissions.mode (with per-project override) and updates on settings change
Click on chip cycles modes (3-way)
Cmd+Shift+Y toggles between Ask ↔ Bypass
/yolo slash command toggles same way
Red safety banner appears within one render of switching to Bypass
Legacy AutoApproveToggle is either removed OR rebound to permissions.mode; no widget writes to legacy auto_approve boolean after this task
Failure case: settings save fails → toast error, mode reverts to previous

tasks.title: scan_output_styles parser
tasks.description: Add scan_output_styles(base, is_global) -> Vec<ClaudeOutputStyle> to claude_config.rs. Reads <base>/output-styles/*.md with YAML frontmatter via serde_yaml. Wire into get_claude_config.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns empty Vec when <base>/output-styles/ doesn't exist
Parses frontmatter name field; falls back to filename when absent
Failure case: malformed YAML — log warning, skip file, don't fail whole scan
Two unit tests: happy path + missing dir

tasks.title: scan_hooks parser
tasks.description: Add scan_hooks(base) -> Vec<ClaudeHook> to claude_config.rs. Reads <base>/settings.json hooks block per Claude Code's schema (event → array of {matcher, command}). Read-only — execution is the claude subprocess's job.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns empty Vec when settings.json absent or has no hooks key
Parses canonical Claude Code hooks schema
Failure case: malformed JSON — log warning, return empty, don't fail
One test for happy path with all 4 events (PreToolUse / PostToolUse / SessionStart / Stop)

tasks.title: read_statusline parser
tasks.description: Add read_statusline(base) -> Option<StatuslineConfig> to claude_config.rs. Reads <base>/settings.json statusLine block. Project scope wins over global.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns None when settings.json absent or has no statusLine
Returns Some(StatuslineConfig) with correct fields when present
Failure case: type is not 'command' — log warning, return None
One test for happy path + one for missing config

tasks.title: Slash command browser sidebar row
tasks.description: Create src/renderer/components/sidebar/ClaudeCommandRow.tsx modeled on ClaudeSkillRow.tsx. Renders one ClaudeCommand (existing struct exposes only { name, source, file_path } — no body field). Show name + relative file path; clicking lazy-reads file via ipc.readTextFile (already exists — verify) and shows body on demand. No struct change required. Mount in ClaudeConfigPanel.tsx between Skills and Steering.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders one row per command showing name + relative file path
Empty state placeholder when array is empty
Click expands; lazy-reads file via ipc.readTextFile and shows body. Second click collapses.
Failure case: file read fails (deleted/permission) → row shows inline 'Could not read file' instead of crashing
bun run check:ts passes

tasks.title: CLAUDE.md memory file editor
tasks.description: Create src/renderer/components/sidebar/MemoryFileEditor.tsx. Dialog with textarea bound to file body, Save button writes via ipc.writeTextFile (add wrapper if missing), Reload pulls latest from disk. Subscribes to onClaudeConfigChanged for hot-reload.
acceptanceCriteria: Editor opens with file body pre-loaded
Save persists to disk; reload pulls latest
External edit re-loads editor body within ~300ms via watcher
Failure case: write error — inline error message, body preserved
bun run check:ts passes

tasks.title: Output style picker UI + subprocess flag wiring
tasks.description: Create src/renderer/components/chat/OutputStylePicker.tsx (dropdown next to model picker). Lists claudeConfigStore.config.outputStyles. Persists selection to task.outputStyle. acp/commands.rs appends --output-style <name> on next subprocess invocation.
acceptanceCriteria: Picker renders outputStyles; 'Default' is always first
Switching style on a task persists to the task record
Subsequent claude invocations include --output-style <name> flag
Failure case: invalid style name — claude rejects, Klaudex catches stderr and surfaces toast
bun run check:ts and bun run check:rust pass

tasks.title: Hooks viewer in Settings → Advanced
tasks.description: Create src/renderer/components/settings/hooks-section.tsx. Read-only display of claudeConfigStore.config.hooks grouped by event. Note: 'Hooks are executed by the Claude CLI, not Klaudex.' Mount in SettingsPanel.tsx under Advanced.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders hooks grouped by event name
Empty state when no hooks defined
Failure case: hook with empty command renders <empty> rather than crashing
bun run check:ts passes

tasks.title: Statusline renderer with sandboxed shell exec
tasks.description: Create src/renderer/components/chat/Statusline.tsx mounted under ChatInput. Reads claudeConfigStore.config.statusline. New Tauri command run_statusline_command runs the shell command with 2s timeout, 1KB stdout cap, PATH-only env, JSON context on stdin (cwd, model, task_id, message_count).
acceptanceCriteria: Statusline appears only when config.statusline is non-null
Re-renders on task state change without flicker
Failure case: command times out → '[statusline timeout]' placeholder, no crash
Failure case: > 1KB stdout → truncated with ellipsis
Failure case: non-zero exit → renders truncated stderr (80 chars)
Sandbox: PATH-only env, HOME and PWD explicitly set

Integration test (cargo, in src-tauri/src/commands/statusline.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tests): three cases — (a) fast happy-path 'echo hi' returns 'hi' within 100ms, (b) 'sleep 5' terminates and returns timeout placeholder at ~2s, (c) infinite stdout truncates at 1KB
bun run check:ts and bun run check:rust pass

tasks.title: Import permissions from ~/.claude/settings.json
tasks.description: Add 'Import from Claude Code settings' button to permissions-section.tsx. New Tauri command read_claude_settings_permissions reads file. Confirm dialog shows allow/deny counts before merging dedup-style.
acceptanceCriteria: Button reads file, opens confirm dialog with rule counts
After confirm, dedup-merges into current settings
Failure case: file missing — button disabled with tooltip
Failure case: malformed JSON — toast error, no merge
bun run check:ts and bun run check:rust pass

tasks.title: Permission matcher + UI integration tests
tasks.description: Vitest tests for permissions-section.tsx (mode switch, add/remove rule, banner state). Cargo tests for matcher edge cases (already in TASK-102 — verify).
acceptanceCriteria: At least 8 matcher test cases pass
At least 5 UI test cases pass
Failure case test: deny rule + allow rule both match → result is Deny
All tests pass under npx vitest run and cargo test

tasks.title: Output style + hook + statusline parser tests
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] modules to claude_config.rs covering scan_output_styles, scan_hooks, read_statusline. Each: happy path, missing dir/file, malformed input. Use tempfile.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 2 tests per parser (happy + failure)
All tests pass under cargo test
Failure case: malformed JSON in settings.json — scan_hooks and read_statusline both return empty/None without panicking
